hero.title: Hidden Gems of Japan, to the World.
hero.subtitle: Creating New Tourism, Together.
hero.description: With global perspective and Japanese heart, we discover hidden values,<0/>connect them to the world, and return benefits to local communities.<0/>From discovery to sales, we solve tourism challenges end-to-end.

solutions.title: DHJ's Integrated Solutions
solutions.subtitle: Solving tourism challenges not as 'dots' but as a 'line'.

phase1.title: Discovery & Redefinition
phase1.description: Strategic Consulting / Proven track record in Izu & Shimane

phase2.title: Digitalization & Visualization
phase2.description: Tourism DX & AI Solutions / Translating charm into 'deliverable forms' with data
phase2.note: ※Implemented by Meta/Google alumni with world-class algorithms

phase3.title: Experience Infrastructure
phase3.description: Tour Planning & Property Management / Solving language barriers with AI

phase4.title: Global Sales

phase5.title: Profit Return & Reinvestment

valueCircle.title: Value Circulation Model (Example)
valueCircle.intro: Taking traditional crafts as an example, we create this circulation:
valueCircle.step1: Discovery: Reevaluate craftsmanship as contemporary value
valueCircle.step2: Visualization: Multilingual storytelling with AI, global reach via SNS
valueCircle.step3: Experience: Renovate old houses into stays integrated with craft workshops
valueCircle.step4: Sales: Offer '3-day dialogue with craftsmen' to affluent travelers
valueCircle.step5: Return: Support successor training programs with part of revenue
valueCircle.conclusion: Sustainable circulation for regional economy achieved

whyDHJ.title: Why DHJ Can Deliver
whyDHJ.subtitle: Proven not just in theory, but in execution

reason1.title: World-Class Digital Execution
reason1.description: Team members from Meta (Facebook/Instagram) and Google (Search/Maps) implement strategies based on deep platform algorithm understanding. From 'casual SNS' to 'data-driven ROI maximization'.

reason2.title: Regional Partnership Track Record
reason2.description: Ongoing partnerships in Izu Peninsula and Shimane Prefecture. Proven execution capability on the ground, not just theory.

reason3.title: 24/7 Global Operations
reason3.description: Philippines-based global market operations. Direct sales channels to affluent overseas travelers.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.heading: Connecting hearts and land,<0/> <1>weaving stories through time</1>
philosophy.description1: We, Discovery Hidden Japan, connect travelers with regions and bring the hidden beauty and stories of Japan to the world.
philosophy.description2: We cherish encounters with authentic life, culture, and atmosphere found beyond over-commercialized tourist destinations, and redefine the value of travel.
philosophy.description3: By serving as a bridge connecting regions and travelers, and addressing social issues through alleviating overtourism and regional revitalization, we advocate for a <0>new era of tourism</0> woven through people, regions, and the world.

overview.title: Business Overview
overview.description: With a focus on <0>alleviating overtourism</0> and <1>regional revitalization</1>,<2/> we create a sustainable future for tourism

customerSatisfaction.label: Customer Satisfaction
customerSatisfaction.description: Top-class retention rate in the industry

executives.title: Executive Team
executives.subtitle: Fusing Global Expertise with Local Execution

shoKishiro.background: Track record at Meta (Facebook/Instagram Ads), introducing world-class digital marketing standards to the tourism industry.

yoshihiroFujimoto.background: Google alumni. Expertise in search algorithms and Maps optimization to improve online visibility of tourist destinations.

takashiAoki.background: From JTB. Practical travel industry experience and large-scale operational construction capability.

junkoOkabe.background: Specializes in community-based tourism production, realizing numerous collaborative projects with local governments.

ayanoFujimoto.background: Microsoft alumni. Merging technology and tourism to achieve operational efficiency and enhanced guest experiences.

beautifulVillages.title: Certified Member of 'The Most Beautiful Villages in Japan' Association
beautifulVillages.description: Discovery Hidden Japan has been certified as a member company of 'The Most Beautiful Villages in Japan' Association. We will continue to promote sustainable tourism while preserving the beauty and culture of local regions.
